description_long: This object depicts a distorted adult pedestrian figure in a dynamic, mid-motion pose, with limbs and torso unnaturally elongated and twisted. The figure appears to be female, with long hair and a fitted sleeveless top paired with tight pants. The arms and legs are stretched and bent at extreme angles, giving the figure a surreal, almost fragmented appearance. The face is visible from the front, but the features are warped along with the rest of the body. The clothing is form-fitting and modern, resembling casual or athletic wear. The overall form is humanoid but highly abstracted, with exaggerated proportions and broken continuity in the limbs.
description: A distorted adult female pedestrian figure in dynamic motion, with elongated, twisted limbs and modern, form-fitting clothing. The body and limbs are highly abstracted and fragmented.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, upper torso, and arms dramatically stretched upward and outward, with one leg bent and the other extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the extreme twisting of the torso and the unnatural angles of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, the spine's curve, and the exaggerated extension of both arms and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the contorted posture and the fragmented, angular appearance of the limbs.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and tight pants
attribute_posture: dynamic, mid-motion with limbs extended and twisted
